name: Alien Art Museum
description: I'm in a Alien Art Museum
hints: An alien art museum with TWO treasures!
Take both the painting and the sculpture - they are treasures.
Read the alien sign for possible clues.
GET PAIN and GET SCUL. Both are treasures to bring to room 22.
notes: Alien Art Museum containing two treasures: the Rare Alien Painting and the Alien Sculpture.
